class.name: AbilitySystemEffect
class.brief_description: Resource defining modifications to attributes and tags.
class.description: [AbilitySystemEffect] defines a package of attribute modifiers and tags. Can be instant, have a duration, or be infinite.

method.name: add_modifier
method.description: Adds an attribute modifier.

method.name: get_activation_blocked_tags
method.description: Returns the list of tags that block the application of this effect.

method.name: get_activation_required_tags
method.description: Returns the list of tags required to apply this effect.

method.name: get_blocked_tags
method.description: Returns the list of tags that are blocked (suppressed) while this effect is active.

method.name: get_cues
method.description: Returns the collection of cues triggered by this effect.

method.name: get_execute_periodic_tick_on_application
method.description: Returns true if a periodic tick should execute immediately upon application.

method.name: get_modifier_attribute
method.description: Returns the name of the attribute targeted by a modifier at a given index.

method.name: get_modifier_count
method.description: Returns the number of modifiers defined in this effect.

method.name: get_modifier_magnitude
method.description: Returns the base magnitude of a specific modifier by its index.

method.name: get_modifier_operation
method.description: Returns the mathematical operation of a specific modifier.

method.name: get_modifiers_count
method.description: Returns the total count of modifiers.

method.name: get_period
method.description: Returns the time interval between periodic ticks.

method.name: get_removed_tags
method.description: Returns the list of tags that are removed when this effect is applied.

method.name: get_stacking_policy
method.description: Returns the stacking behavior policy.

method.name: is_modifier_custom
method.description: Returns true if the specified modifier uses custom calculation logic.

method.name: set_activation_blocked_tags
method.description: Sets the list of tags that block the application of this effect.

method.name: set_activation_required_tags
method.description: Sets the list of tags required to apply this effect.

method.name: set_blocked_tags
method.description: Sets the list of tags that are blocked while this effect is active.

method.name: set_cues
method.description: Sets the collection of cues triggered by this effect.

method.name: set_execute_periodic_tick_on_application
method.description: Enables or disables immediate periodic tick on application.

method.name: set_modifiers_count
method.description: Sets the number of modifiers.

method.name: set_period
method.description: Sets the interval between periodic ticks.

method.name: set_removed_tags
method.description: Sets the list of tags to be removed upon application of the effect.

method.name: set_stacking_policy
method.description: Sets the stacking behavior policy.

members.member: Tags granted while effect is active.
If true, duration is calculated via ASC callback (index -1).

constants.constant: Effect is applied once and removed immediately.
Effect lasts for a specified duration.
New application replaces the old (resets timer).
Adds the magnitude to the attribute.
Multiplies the attribute by the magnitude.
Divides the attribute by the magnitude.
Overrides the attribute with the magnitude.
